codeReview.summary: Implementation replaced the datasets and preserved seed upload structure, but it does not fully satisfy the required Lakewood ZIP-code constraint from the feature description.

issues.description: Animal-control record uses ZIP 80214, but the feature requires Lakewood addresses to use ZIP codes in the 80226-80232 range.
Animal-control record uses ZIP 80215, but the feature requires Lakewood addresses to use ZIP codes in the 80226-80232 range.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Secret-handling guidance appears incomplete: the worker transcript includes a full OPENROUTER API key literal, suggesting there is no enforced convention to avoid echoing secrets in transcript/handoff text.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: worker-transcripts.jsonl:1 contains an assistant message with the full `sk-or-v1-...` key string; AGENTS.md documents key locations but does not explicitly prohibit printing secrets in outputs.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, skill procedure, and commit diff for fix-config-and-create-datasets. The feature is close, but it fails a stated requirement because two Lakewood addresses use ZIP codes outside 80226-80232.
